title: gladiolus × pudibundus
intro: Gladiolus × pudibundus, also known as the 'Lady's Bedstraw', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gladiolus × pudibundus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus × pudibundus can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
